summary: Full-stack testing completed for Sachin Schedule mobile app. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including login, dashboard, schedule, task toggle, history, settings, and register page. One backend bug fixed (MongoDB _id in response).

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' style props - should use 'boxShadow' instead (cosmetic only, not breaking)
Console warning about 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated - use 'style.pointerEvents' (cosmetic only)

action_items: Optional: Update StyleSheet to use boxShadow instead of shadow* props to remove console warnings
Optional: Update pointerEvents usage to style.pointerEvents
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
✅ JWT Bearer token authentication working correctly for mobile app
✅ Brute force protection implemented (5 attempts, 15 min lockout)
✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ testID attributes present on all interactive elements
✅ API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
✅ Data persistence verified - task toggles persist in MongoDB
seed_data_creation: Admin user sachin@example.com/sachin123 seeded on startup. Test users created during registration tests with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend tests cover auth, schedule, history endpoints. Frontend tests cover login, dashboard, navigation, task toggle, history calendar, settings. Today is Sunday so some schedule items are excluded (bananas, supplements). The 'wash_face' task was toggled during testing.
rca_of_issue: MongoDB _id exposure in /api/auth/me: Root cause was that get_current_user() converts _id to string but doesn't remove it from the user dict. The /api/auth/me endpoint was directly returning the user object. Fix: Added filtering to exclude _id key before returning response. Verified fix with pytest.
